reviews_data.review_text: Delicious drinks and friendly service. Will definitely come back!
The strawberry and mango tornados are so yummy and the service here is great!

Went there two times, first time i had some interesting boba alternative, passion fruit, not my favorite but the tea was great. That time they ran out boba, however the guy working there was super friendly and accommodating, he let us try couple different boba jelly things and we picked one. The other time we went they had regular tapioca boba and the tea was great. Would come back. It’s also a cute place, and picture ready for those interested.

P.S. My ratings are based on whether I believe I could make a better or healthier version at home. If food/drinks/service impress me, I’ll be happy to come back. If not the stars reflect that.

🚩 they offer incentives for leaving a 5 star review

I spent a little over $20 for three drinks

Ube slush w/ boba - Didn’t taste at all like Ube, crunchy ice b/c not blended enough, undercooked boba

Strawberry matcha - The matcha was dark green in color and so so sooo bitter and gritty. I enjoyed the few sips of strawberry from the bottom until the matcha fell to the bottom. Had to toss the whole drink

Hong Kong milk tea w/ grass jelly - below mid, tastes like old tea leaves were used. I could swear it’s Lipton. Milk tea powder would’ve tasted better. Grass Jelly was so strange, very very sweet and tasted like honey.

Just reminds me how spoiled I am in Dallas with the likes of Tiger Sugar, TP Tea, 7 Leaves, and Moge Tee

Typically love this boba place but today was one of the worst experience to date. We walked in and didn’t even get greeted the young lady at the cash register stared at us with out saying a word for about 3 mins before WE had to be the ones to greet her. The drinks themselves were very subpar and even though we asked for extra boba got less than we usually get. Drinks had no flavor and tasted like watery milk. All of the benches were broken and the wood pinches your legs when you sit in it.This place used to be great until they got new employees. Would no longer recommend.

One of my favorite after-dinner dessert stops 🖤 I do wish they still had the small sizes for their fruit drinks; I go a little less often now because of how expensive the larger sizes are. But the staff are really friendly and it’s always delicious.

Milk Cha Cha has quickly become one of my favorite bubble tea spots! The milk tea is rich and creamy without being overly sweet, and the tea flavor still shines through beautifully. The tapioca pearls are consistently chewy and fresh—never hard or soggy.

They also offer great variety with fun flavors and toppings, so there’s something for everyone. The drinks are presented nicely, and the atmosphere is bright and welcoming—perfect for hanging out with friends or grabbing a quick treat.

If you’re a bubble tea lover, Milk Cha Cha is definitely worth trying. It’s refreshing, delicious, and always leaves me wanting to come back for another cup!

Was passing through when my children and their friend wanted boba. This was our first time as we’re from out of state. Ordered 3 drinks and I should’ve ordered myself one because it was delicious! Would recommend. They were excited about the popping boba with the fresh fruit chunks it was refreshing and honestly not bad of a price. Drinks were $6.75 each!
This is one of our favorite boba of all time. We keep going back to it no matter how many other places we go to.
Great boba awesome staff

I was pleasantly surprised to find proper milk tea in Charlotte. And this place doesn't disappoint. The selection of options is vast and the service is friendly and fast.

I did find the boba to be not as soft (almost like they were boiled a while ago and not as fresh as I wanted) and the drink even at 50% sugar was quite sweet. I think next time I will go for 25%. This is especially necessary if you add boba, since Boba is often boiled in honey so that sugar level cannot be adjusted.

Anyways, I'm overall happy, was a bit disappointed about the tapioca pearls.

We drove 20 minutes with the whole family specifically to this location because it’s supposed to stay open later on Fridays and Saturdays. According to the posted hours, you’re open until 10 PM. We arrived at 9:50 PM, only to find the store already completely closed—lights off, doors shut, no one inside.

Why advertise extended hours if you’re not actually going to honor them? It’s incredibly disappointing, especially when families make an effort to come out late expecting service. Please update your hours or make sure your staff follows the posted schedule.

Service was lackluster. Employees were not enthused. Told them it was my first time, gave no recommendations and zero energy, until I came back for a refund. The matcha was brown and the drink was literally just thrown together vs actually prepared in the way I’ve seen boba prepared at other boba places and it was lacking flavor very watery. I got the strawberry matcha with strawberry poppers. Do not recommend.

This place has a good drinks I love some and some of it I don’t. The only complaint I have is the dirty the bathroom I understand it’s only one bathroom for everyone  🤦🏼‍♂️🤦🏻‍♀️👶 employee etc and the seating area is dirty as well 😕 they have to clean the place. I don’t want to imagine the inside. 😳
Service was very quick it took roughly 30-45 seconds to get the drink after ordering, it was moderately expensive for a drink at about $5-$7 a drink but it’s definitely worth it, would come again.

The employees are very friendly but overall this boba place SUCKS!!!

I’ve went twice , the first time I had a milk swirl drink… it was straight up milk with a hint of boba …. Second time I had the strawberry matcha & IT TASTED TERRIBLE , the match wasn’t good , and the drink was watered down , the strawberry purée was okay but the boba wasn’t enough to even save the drink .

Always a have a great experience here, I love the fruity mango tea with lychee popping boba but today I tried the chocolate tea with boba and Oreo pieces. They even have games to set up and play with friends in store.
Good boba!
One of the best spots in south Charlotte for boba tea. Good ube/taro options. Nice atmosphere with board and card games available to play. Was very-well made.  Friendly service.
Amazing tea, fast service, super cute store! 10/10 (I particularly love the Thai tea)

Milk cha-cha are you a joke?? Got a kiwi fruit tea and it’s the worst kiwi I’ve ever had.

Do not recommend this place. The ingredients are just so cheap
没话说 太难喝了 跟放了一晚上一样 我点了个kiwi的果茶
Ube Latte bubble tea was quite good!
Delicious tea / boba
Smells so good in here😍 My boyfriend ordered the brown suger milk swirl and the taro slushie with Boba in both. They were so yummy and we got them so fast.

reviews_data.review_text: Love love everything about our service and drinks ❤️

review_questions.Parking options: Free parking lot, Free street parking

reviews_data.review_text: No Greeting upon walking in. Only reason I’d take away a star. The drinks are always tasty.!!
Taro milk tea was delicious
Fantastic options for bubble tea and other sweet treats. Really enjoyed the classic milk tea with tapioca pearls. I hope to visit again!
Always love the quality and service here
amazing def recommend
They have good selection of boba to select from
Nice variety of teas , super nice staff and cute decoration
Really good boba, the cups are top notch
BEST BOBA AROUND!
I got straight milk in a cup.

They are never consistent with the Strawberry Matcha milk tea. There is this specific guy that makes it like how the advertised picture looks like. But if you don’t catch the days he works, other workers make it horrible and they are very greedy with the strawberry in it. My last order, they just literally filled the cup with milk more than anything that all you taste was just milk and sugar. If you kno how that taste like, then you know what I’m talking about. Which makes it upsetting because if I wanted milk and sugar l, I wouldn’t come to a boba shop for that. We asked the worker that it’s not consistent, she wasn’t accommodating or sorry. She says they make it same way as always. Which I know it’s a lie because I have pictures of the one I used to get from that specific guy. And the one they made us I. The last two times we’re not even close to it. Very upset and will never support their business again.
Drinks are inconsistent. Sweetness level changes all the time. Rude customers service.

I had come already 2 times to Milk Cha Cha and it’s been great!!! I loved their boba tea. You can select the level of sugar of your drink and they also have a lot of options to choose from. I tried the strawberry and ube swirl. Their employees are nice. Will definitely be back soon.

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hey Maddy! 
I want to deeply apologize for your experience. We do train our employees to take orders up until the second we close. I will certainly look into what happened this night. If there is anything we can do please contact us at milkchachasouthpark@gmail.com. Again, I deeply apologize and hope we can make it up to you in the future!
reviews_data.review_text: I was so excited to try out a new bubble tea place and drove from Cary, NC. It was 9:22 PM and I drove two and a half hours but was unable to get my order :( All three workers were there, the lights were on, and the door was opened so I walked in but was told they were closed. I understand they were tired and had cleaned up but it was sad to see that they closed before the time on Google (should be updated on Google if they close at 9:00PM).
Amazing boba!! And super cute and fun atmosphere

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Mango, Milk Foam, Thai Tea Slush 22oz

The place was cute and the seating was very comfortable. They had many good options to order from but I ended up ordering one I wasn't in the mood for so that's on me.
It’s really good 👍 nice cool place

Cute place

reviews_data.owner_answer: We are so glad you enjoyed you drink!
reviews_data.review_text: Highly recommend Darjeeling milk tea with Boba 😍

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Kamilya! So glad you enjoyed!
reviews_data.review_text: Great place. The staff was friendly and tea was delicious!
The mango yakult was tasty. They also have comfy pillows, booth seating, and games!
The cutest place to get boba drinks. The workers were so sweet and the place was very clean and welcoming. Definitely will be coming back again regularly :)
Very good and legit to the photos, made with real fruit!! I’m definitely coming back and telling my friends
love the staff and ever location is so cute and great for pictures!! i suggest the taro milk tea or peach soda 🫶🫶
Employees were not friendly at all.
My husband and I enjoyed our drinks and will be back!!!!
Good variety of drinks!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: We are so glad you enjoyed everything! Thank you for the support!

reviews_data.review_text:
Nice little spot with good flavors and helpful service. I was not totally familiar with all the options. I asked for some info on a couple that sounded interesting. The guy behind the counter took the time to explain the differences and help me decide. I ended up going with both :P
A fun tip: the Chocolate Milk Tea is popular. They didn’t have chocolate, so they subbed in Oreos and it was AMAZING. It should probably be it’s own drink. Id suggest giving that a try.
Super fast service, very friendly, great boba. A+ !

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Matthew! So glad you enjoyed it 🧋

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Strawberry Milk Swirl, Mango Swirl with Strawberry

reviews_data.review_text: I tried the Brown Sugar Milk Swirl as a recommendation from the manager and I was not disappointed! The tea was amazing as well as the service! Definitely will be telling family/friends!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi T M, I apologize for your bad experience. We do not condone this type of behavior and I will definitely relay this to my employees and let them know it is not okay to do this. Again i do apologize. This should not have happened and is unacceptable. I will personally take care of this myself. If you would like, please email me at milkchachasouthpark@gmail.com with the day you came in and around what time, so I can further investigate. Thank you.
reviews_data.review_text: 1 star for racial profiling. Went here two days ago with a friend. On the way out we stopped by the snack shelf. The guy behind the counter, who had not spoken to us once the whole time we were sitting there, became very aggressive, asking us what we wanted without even giving us a chance to look. He even stopped serving the people at the counter (there was a line!) to do this. I've worked in restaurants and retail and know he was employing anti-theft tactics, and I was sitting there long enough to see no one else got interrogated. Next time just put a "No Blacks" sign on the window. We'll get the message and save our money.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Natalie! We appreciate you
reviews_data.review_text: Staff was very friendly and the drink was great!
Nice Bobba tea
It was really good!

Hi Julianna! Thanks so much for your awesome review! Based on this picture it looks like you went to our ballantyne store at 9826 sandy rock place. If its not too much to ask, can you also post this review at the ballantyne location as well? Thanks so much for your support!

reviews_data.review_text: The staff is very kind, the drinks are great, there is a diverse drink choice (great for me who doesn’t like tea or coffee!), and the cups/shop are very cute! 10/10 I recommend this place, it’s my favorite boba shop in Charlotte!!

reviews_data.review_text: One of my favorite milk tea shop. :)
I rly like the boba
Love the vibes here! Great place to stop by and enjoy some beverages at a shopping trip at Rea Farm. Drinks are great!

first time coming here today at the grand opening at rea farms, and it was a very nice environment :), very friendly staff, cute and minimalistic place, very good boba tea
10/10 recommend 🤍

A bubble tea lover's paradise. I love love love bubble tea spots that have matcha on the menu, and believe me, not many do! I recently came here for bubble tea, although, it was a treat by one of my friends, so I decided to try something I've never had before. I decided on a strawberry match tea with boba. Personally, I don't like sweet things mixed with my milk teas, so this wasn't something I enjoyed. However, I have gotten my usual order from this location before (Match Milk Tea w/Boba), so I know they do a good job.

I would recommend this spot!

A small shop with a fantastic atmosphere and drinks. I had the brown sugar tea and that was a chef's kiss. Angels were singing in the background when I had it. I was recommended the mango tea the next time I come back, or any fruit teas in general, because it really does taste like the fruit.

I love Milk Cha-Cha bubble teas. I tried several and my favorite is 0%-25% sweet bobba strawberry mango Yakurt because it’s caffeine free, probiotic and something unique to this business and not found in other bubble tea places.

The complaint I have is the sweetness of the drinks. And I guess the service as well.
Why is the default sweetness straight up diabetes? Why is it 100% and not 50%?

Can we normalize asking people what sweetness they want , and if not please don’t feed them 100% sweet , it’s disgusting and unhealthy. Tastes like I gulped a jar of honey. To the trash it went. And they are not cheap $9 per one large drink with bobas.
I have yet to find another boba shop that is better than this place. The tea is brewed nicely and boba is soft, warm, and syrupy. If I ever come back to Charlotte, it's to visit this place.
Wonderful service and drinks!

The tea was delicious and the price was reasonable. They were also quick. Very clean store and really pretty. I gave four stars because the two employees weren't friendly at all. I understand sometimes there's day we don't feel like talking at all, but not even a smile... The tea is very good, I will go back for the tea, but only in sunny 🌞 days...

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi Sam,

Thank you for your valuable feedback and we apologize for the bad customer service experience. if it's not too much to ask, can you please let us know when you went to our shop and what did the employee look like? We constantly stress on providing good customer service, but without knowing exactly who the individuals are it is very hard to individualize our focus and ensure disciplinary action is taken. If possible, can you please email us the date, time, and what the employee looks like to milkchachallc@gmail.com?

Thank you so much for your help and feedback.
reviews_data.review_text: Love the drinks but the employees need to take a class on customer service because it is lacking. Every time I go here I am not greeted, so I say “hi how are you?” I get zero response. Don’t even get a “have a good day!” as I’m leaving. Just seems like as soon as you walk in they can’t wait for you to leave.

As an Asian dude who is obsessed with boba.. this place is still my favorite, I’ve traveled all over the US and I miss this place a lot! The quality and variety of their boba is unmatched.

Highly would recommend if you’re ever in the area. Parking is easy too.

This is the second time I've been here and definitely will be the last. Everytime I go, the Boba is boiling hot to the point it turns what should be an ice cold drink lukewarm. That, and my Kiwi Tea was overridden with hard seeds and granulated textures it became undrinkable. Two sips and I threw it in the trash and left.

Staff were more interested in talking to each other than welcoming us & telling us about the products.
My first & last time going there
really nice milk tea！！！
Great boba and people. I come here all the time for boba.
非常正宗的奶茶 两天报道一次，在我心里clt排名第一的奶茶店
One of my new favorite milk tea spots in Charlotte, the Rose Oolong with aloe was incredible. I like it at 25% sweet so you can really taste the flavor. I highly recommend it!

This establishment consistently delivers high-quality and flavorful tea, which has kept us coming back for more on multiple occasions. The standout option for me is the mango tea with lychee jelly, which I highly recommend from their menu. Overall, this spot ranks among the best in Charlotte for bubble tea.

Stopped by Milk Cha-Cha after church today.

It's a nice spot for a refreshing drink. I tried the Strawberry Cha Tea. It's smooth and you could taste the freshness of the strawberries.

The service was fast and Carlton was incredibly friendly and agreed to the photo. The atmosphere is relaxed and chic. I would definitely return.

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi Bradley, I apologize for the bad experience. If it’s not too much trouble can you please let us know what date and time and the description of the employees being rude and not being attentive? We would need to make sure there is disciplinary actions taken. If possible, our email is milkchachallc@gmail.com

Thank you for your time and again we apologize for your bad experience.
reviews_data.review_text: Staff was on their phones,  very rude...! I'm not visit that place again
They forgot my boba in my Chocolate Milk Tea.
Love the banana 🍌 swirl here! Delicious!💗
Super friendly staff for this boba newbie. Was able to find something without added sugar. Everything was fun and tasty 🤩🧋
The help was amazing because my kids had a million questions about the Boba Tea (never heard of it until then). My family loved the tea and raved the whole time they were drinking it!!!!

Points: Great drinks, okay service, okay atmosphere.
I'm staying at a nearby hotel and saw this place passing by. I knew I had to stop and get something; I got the Pineapple Bubbly Cha-Cha with strawberry popping boba add-in. This was absolutely delicious and I'll probably stop again before leaving! The service was alright. I've seen other reviews mentioning the lack of "smiles", but for me it wasn't too different than service I've received from other boba shops or Asian markets. She was polite and quick with the order, but not very helpful when I mentioned I had never been there. Simply pointed at the pictures and the menu. I'm comfortable without human interaction, though, and I had peeked at the menu before coming. The only other reason this didn't make 5 stars is the atmosphere. A lot of people referred to it as clean, and maybe it was prior, but there was dust caked on a bunch of the decorations, especially the big fake plant right at the front door. Otherwise, though the tables were clean and I think it's cute they provide board games - though I definitely wouldn't find myself using this place as a hang out at all. I do like the collection of merch available and I almost purchased a stuffed dinosaur, but noticed the arm was ripped and the stuffing exposed, but it was still in the package ready to sell 🤔

Summary: great place for grabbing a drink on the go! Dust your fake plants! Merch is cute but look it over well before buying

Took the family to Milk Cha-Cha and we absolutely loved it! From the moment we entered the establishment the atmosphere was filled with great vibes. Perhaps it was the chill music or the welcoming staff. The tea was amazing! Peach would have to be my personal favorite. Truly up for debate as every tea we ordered all tasted really great. Hong Kong was also a strong pleaser at our table. Speaking of table, they have board games at each table. Definitely a great way to people to stay awhile, enjoy some tasty refreshments, and unwind from the crazy world outside. Rest assured, we will be regular at Milk Cha-Cha!
One of the best boba tea.
Love it

Very rude and unfriendly/ unprofessional staff, I came to meet up here with a friend for the first time after hearing somewhat good things.
But even my friend was disgusted by the employees behavior, it was slow for a Saturday and a female employee rudely greeted me when I needed to order.
While waiting the boys were being obnoxious and loud, making weird inappropriate jokes that disturbed me and other customers you can tell.

I work in customer service and this was just awful, the drink was poorly made too.
Won’t be coming back again unless you get better staff who actually want to do their jobs

Service was wonderful and the tea was amazing!!! We got the ube slush and the cantaloupe slush. It was a hot day so it hit the spot!!! It was so creamy and delicious! The flavor was strong and even though I drink slowly it tasted good to the last drop! The boba also was on point and tasted a bit warm and nice and soft and chewy. The only thing I would change about this place is the seating. It isn’t inviting or unique. This place is so good the seating should match and be unique and fun and make me want to enjoy my boba there! Will definitely be back for more!!!

Love this place , the owners are amazing , the boba is fresh , amazing quality! I have gone to many boba places in my life , I consider my self a picky food person, this place hands down the best boba place you will find!! Highly recommend their Taro, Hong Kong tea and dragonfruit!  You will get addicted to this place and will want to go every day!!!

The first we visited this place was probably in December 2021, we had great experience. Today, I went back during the day around 12, had fantastic experience. The ube drink was very very good. However, we revisit it again at night before they close. The service was meh, drink was disappointed. I ordered a hot drink because it was cold outside, the drink was like a little warm, maybe it was almost cold. We asked for some milk, but the cashier charged us for like a buba tea drink. We kind feel that is alittle over charged. Overall, we do like the place, but just feel it is better to visit during the day.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Jacqui, apologies for the confusion. If you are looking for pure teas, we do serve organic jasmine yin hao and our rose ooloong. Our rose oolong is made from real rose pedals steeped together with imported organic iron goddess oolong tea without any artificial flavoring. Although our pure tea section is small, one of our most favorite products is the fresh strawberry tea where it is organic jasmine tea blended with fresh strawberries. Our strawberry milk swirl has strawberry puree that is handmade puree from freshly cut strawberries and sugar. Thanks so much for your feedback and support!
reviews_data.review_text: Don't have any pure teas - all the teas they have are either milk teas or flavored with something like strawberry or rose... A real bubble tea place should have real teas available, i.e. plain black tea, green tea, oolong tea, mountain tea, etc. without the artificial bs!

I am a great lover of bubble tea 🧋 but one of my problems is that I am a little lactose intolerant 😖😞 I love to see that of so many locations I have visited, this is the first one I find with vegetable milk option 💚 I ordered 100% ice and sugar and it is still balanced and delicious and the decoration of the bathroom door and the entrance are great and funny, I must definitely try other flavors again and maybe a bigger size 🤭 my boyfriend and I will definitely come back 🫶

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks so much for this awesome review Jaems!
reviews_data.review_text: Definitely in my top 3 boba locations in Charlotte. Boba was fresh and the milk tea was not overly sweetened.

Hey listen, It's a Boba shop. It's gonna give ya delicious Bobas. Study the menu before hand. Only a few tables, most have game boards. It's a hangout joint for the locals.

The lady taking our orders was kind and warm. The asian girl seemed to be having a bad day and didn't make us feel greeted at all. Head down, no interest that there is a customer. However, she made our drinks in moments. Definitely a master at work.

You'll love your experience because it's Boba. If that doesn't brighten your day then you need a friend to remind you how awesome Boba and tea really is.

Have a great one. (I did Thai milk tea with boba, get a large or go home) lol

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Miriam for this awesome review! We are so glad you liked our strawberry tea! Hope to see you bak soon!
reviews_data.review_text:
I ordered the chunky strawberry tea. It did taste fresh and had the right amount of sweetness.
Service was quick.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks so much for your awesome review Abbie! Hope to see you back soon!
reviews_data.review_text: My favorite place to get boba in Charlotte! They have so many authentic drinks and lots of non-dairy/vegan options. My favorite is the Mango Fruit Tea.

Their boba and fruit teas are okay. It’s good, but not my favorite. It’s definitely on the pricier end compared to other boba shops. The brown sugar can be a bit too sweet despite the less sweet and extra ice, but that’s just me because some people like extra sweet things. Milk tea is a bit watery. The Yakult line is pretty good.

Went there today, it was my sisters first time there. She tried the Thai tea but did not like it. When i asked for them to make a different one for her they told me to pay for a new one.
Very rude service. I have been coming here for 1 year and never had such bad service !
😍 loved the boba

If milk tea is your thing, then this is the place for your.

Stopped by on a sunday and we got our drinks within a 2-3minutes. They're really fast. Drinks were good. Service was good, they did a good job explaining the drinks and level of sweetness of each offering.

It's also in a nice location that is located in a contemporary and modern space.
service/friendliness isn’t amazing, but their boba is good. the employees seem less bored and lifeless these days which is why I increased the stars

I've been here several times before for events, but I was finally able to make it back on my own so I can actually review it now.

On our most recent visit, my husband and I shared a Ube Slush and Mango Milk Swirl. We loved both of them. My personal favorite was the Mango Milk Swirl.

Their boba is a bit too mushy for my preference, so I opt for their jellies as toppings instead. Their drinks always taste fresh. It's definitely worth a stop if you haven't been!
Always the best! Try the Oolong rose tea 20% sweet with extra boba, it’s so good.
It was a pleasant experience, and the drinks were 🔥  I recommend everyone to check it out. It had a friendly vibe.
I adore this place!!! The drinks are always so delicious and the staff is always super friendly. Would recommend!

I visited this place recently while staying in the SouthPark area. I am an anything matcha fan, and when the cashier suggested the strawberry matcha boba tea, I jumped on it. So delicious and enjoyable to drink...and chew. I definitely will be back! 💕🩰
Bubble is sweet!

Delicious Boba Tea!!! I had the Brown Sugar Milk Swirl Boba Tea, husband enjoyed the Strawberry Tea with pop-able Boba, kids had Mango Tea with pop-able Boba and an Ube Slush. Everything was fantastic!!! We’ll definitely be stopping by again when in the area.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks so much for your amazing review!
reviews_data.review_text: the most toe curling, fist clenching, eye watering, scream inducing boba i’ve ever had in my entire life.

guys. i love this place. i live 45~ mins away and i regularly make the trip over here because the boba is just so good. the okinawa latte and matcha are both amazing! and they have milk subs too!!!!!  i’ve been to a lot of boba places but this one will always be my favorite!!! :3
New Bubble Tea place. Delicious. Definitely worth a try. Really nice decor , cool place to hang for a little while
Delicious fruit and bubble teas, tons of choices. Wish they open a location around Spartanburg, SC.

Not my first rodeo at Milk Cha Cha! They did not disappoint. This shop is nestled in a plaza that continues to grow. There is not much seating, but the inside is so cute. Great for quick meets or just picking up. Although there isn't much seating, it does not feel cramped and the aesthetic of the inside has a fresh open feel to it. Not to mention, there are lots of spots for cute photos.

Now on to the drinks! I ordered the mango matcha latte with boba pearls, and my friend got the brown sugar boba. This was my first time having a matcha and mango combo, and to my surprise it was delicious! The matcha was especially strong, which I love. For some, matcha is definitely an acquired taste, so maybe this would not be the right drink for you. The good news is that they have so many other drinks to choose from! A previous drink I've had that was super tasty was the Strawberry yalkult drink-- sweet and tangy in flavor and cold for a nice refresh for the Summer.
Simply the best! Thanks again!!!

Tried this place twice and had a great experience each time. The store was pretty clean with nice decor. I got the brown Sugar Swirl with Boba and Oreo for my first visit and without oreo for my second and both were good. The only thing is that they kinda skimped on the boba, so be sure to ask for extra if you are a huge boba fan. Would definitely come back to this place and try more flavors when in the Southpark area.
THINGS ARE ON THE TABLE
Amazing place and amazing teas. I travel 30 mins every weekend to have the amazing Taro milk tea.
Always order their green milk tea with pudding, great taste and friendly staff, a nice place.
Great tea and prompt service! The young man at the register was very helpful.
loved the boba and the atmosphere!
Great drinks, friendly staff, great variety and reasonable prices. Everything I have tried has tasted amazing and I like that they ask how much ice and sweetness I want in the drink!

reviews_data.review_text: I order some thing and they give me the wrong thing not recommend
One of the yummiest boba experiences in the Charlotte area!
Never disappoints! One of the few places serving matcha that doesn't taste powdery in the drinks.
Really good bubble tea!

We walked in and nobody greeted us. They all just stared... which made us feel kind of uncomfortable. Anyway, I ordered the Thai slush and it wasn't like the normal consistency of a regular slush milk tea boba from other stores. The drink and ice separated easily which is not supposed to happen so I'm thinking they don't have the correct ingredients to keep the drink emulsified. 🤔
cashier was rude and had an attitude.
The Fresh Mango Tea with Tapioca Boba was the BEST BOBA I HAVE EVER HAD!!!!!!! SO GOOD!!!

I visited Milk Cha Cha for the first time
today. A friend had recommended to me.
After reading the reviews I drove thirty minutes to give it a try. It far exceeded my expectations! The staff was wonderful and patient with me as I ask for recommendations. I selected the Fresh Mango yogurt drink with boba and milk foam. I was so delicious. Perfect sweetness and ice. The milk foam really made it. I was so sad to finish it. I will definitely be going back for another and to try other flavors
$6.50 (incl tax) for 22 oz Uber Slush with lychee jelly

I love their jasmine green milk tea! They have the most fragrance jasmine aroma compare to all the tea places I’ve tried. I have drank tea from the east coast to the west coast, none can match Milk Cha Cha flavor so far!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Destiny, thank you for bringing this to our attention. We will thoroughly investigate into this issue via our cameras.
reviews_data.review_text: This was my first time here and I wanted to try the Strawberry Tea. I ordered it through DoorDash as a pick up and I was about 5-10 minutes away. When I got there to pick up, my drink was extremely loose and milky with no slush and the Asian guy with glasses and black hoodie says “yeah sorry, * laughs*, it should be okay”. I asked him if there was anyway he could remake it? He answered “I’m not sure if I can do that” with an attitude. I did not understand the push back on remaking the drink if something is wrong with it, and you as the associate knew that something was wrong with the drink, why not remake it? Thankfully, he remade the drink but made it with an attitude and slammed it on the counter. I did not appreciate the attitude. I usually go to ShareTea and will continue to go there for now on.
Great place for Bubble teas. Son ordered their chocolate tea which was absolutely yummy. And I  ordered their amazing Pineapple Green Tea. Will be going back. Wonderful staff and quick service.
Good place at a great location, wide variety and customizable with any flavor from the menu.
Best boba in Charlotte!

Love coming here when I’m in town! Tried the rose oolong milk tea this time and loved it. Not too sweet but had a hint of rose. I love their boba here so fresh and chewy! That’s why I always get extra boba in my milk teas. The staff here is always so sweet and make the drinks real quick. I will definitely be back to try some more different teas.

Parking is easy there are some spots that you have to parallel in and others where you can just park. Getting here is super easy it’s super close to South Park mall. So if you are going to the mall to shop make sure to get your quick fix of milk teas!
Expansive and creative menu. Caters to all allergies and dietary preferences. Branding is super cute and makes the experience even better. Come here for your bespoke drink needs.
Super friendly and tastes amazing
The Strawberry Milk Swirl was delicious! Really appreciated the tasty fresh strawberry pieces mixed in.

Great vibes, fantastic staff and owners, hip decor and most importantly delicious drinks! This is next level stuff that tastes distinctly better than your average boba chain place. I was never crazy for boba in the past because all I knew was shops like Kung Fu Tea. But Milk Cha Cha is a place I truly enjoyed and I can't recommend it enough. Do yourself a favor and try it out. You won't regret it!

my strawberry milk swirl tasted straight up like white milk and i asked for extra boba but even so it tastes nothing like any strawberries .i looked back at the menu and it says fresh strawberry purée like where is it .
Tasty bubble tea
Love boba but this would have to be the best place yet, great customer service!
Cashier was on her phone and not really helpful for first time customers.
This is the best place in Charlotte to get bubble tea! Everything is made with fresh fruit instead of flavored syrups and they offer dairy free options! Absolutely love this place!

reviews_data.review_text: It brings me back memories! Lol our family used to have a boba store in NYC so this is the closest as good as it gets! Go in and enjoy the fun of it! Favorite brown sugar milk tea 🧋 cheers !
The best boba tea, loved everything I’ve tried so far! Staff is always super friendly and helpful.
my number one favorite boba shop in charlotte! i love their hong kong milk tea with boba, sub with soy milk. it’s my all time favorite! <3
I got the Darjeeling tea, %75 sweet, with Boba and it was delicious!
Definitely one of my favorite places in Charlotte. You can not go wrong with any of the drink options.
Super friendly staff, they explained all the drinks and made great recommendations! We got the brown sugar milk swirl and the banana milk swirl with mango boba amd they were delicious!

Very sad about this experience! Lots of business are closed for the holidays, and that's no problem! We looked online and saw that they were open on google until 9:30 yesterday (Sunday 1/2). We arrive and see a closed sign on the door. There was also another sign that they are closed 1/3 - 1/6. There was another group that walked up and read the sign at the same time as us. Just wished google and yelp was updated so we didn't make the 20 minute drive to come here.
Solid boba! Best in the uptown/South Park area for sure :)
No kidding, you will get the best drink in town.
Love the boba here! Highly recommend the brown sugar milk tea with milk cap
Hands down the best boba in Charlotte! Great service, fresh and super tasty. Love this spot so much!
Very good
Adorable place, feels very cozy and welcoming!!! Bubble tea was very delicious :3

Milk Cha Cha is one of the best boba places in Charlotte. My favorite drink to get there is the strawberry matcha latte. The matcha wasn't too bitter and strawberry not to sweet. The right combination for a great drink. My friends got the Thai tea and the Fresh Mango Yakult which were pretty good. I'm not the biggest fan of boba, but my friends said the boba was great. All around great place to get boba and chill with friends.
My first boba tea experience! The associates helped me choose my tea. (they have soy for non dairy ppl, too!) My iced matcha boba tea was delicious! I can’t wait to go back.

Always so welcoming and such a great place to vibe or hang out! The boba is SO DELICIOUS! It’s my favorite boba place in charlotte! Most places can’t perfect classic teas but they can! The drinks and teas that they have on their menu are just amazing!

Based on the reviews I was hoping for so much, but this was just mediocre. My strawberry tea was burnt (over steeped) which left this bitter dry after taste. The aloe jelly tasted funny. I can't put my finger on what was wrong. Some of the aloe was way too soft, others hard & some had a bit of a sour taste.. The jasmine milk tea was also just okay. We were happy that we got a milk tea for the jasmine, otherwise I can't imagine drinking such a strong floral tea. But, the boba it self was good. We tried the brown sugar boba and that one was the best. Overall, just meh
Kids love it
Wear your mask when you order.. Very fast service and the store anesthetic is very nice.

My daughter has been wanting to go here and we went yesterday and definitely will be coming back! Its such a nice atmosphere, the employees are so nice and helpful if you have questions and we each got a different drink to try and everyone loved theirs!
One of the best places to get Bubble Tea !
I ordered Strawberry Matcha Latte with boba/22oz/ Extra Iced/ 50% Sweetened. I really liked it :) I will definitely come again.
They are so helpful and answered any question I had about their different flavors and toppings.I’m going to be obsessed with this place for a long time!
Love it
I love this place and so does my kids. It has the best boba tea we've tasted so far!
Good and fancy
Super cute place, missing a few of my favorite flavors of tea but has many options to chose from! My tea was a little too sweet for my liking but next time I will ask for less sugar.
Ordered a Chocolate milk tea with boba topping and felt it could have had more boba. Place is nice, staff friendly. Prices are also okay.

Ambiance is lovely! They are located in the nicest area and you can park for 1 hour on the street or nearby parking garage for free. The staff was friendly and helpful. The music they played was nice and upbeat. There was seating and gorgeous decor. All gender restroom available. I'll definitely be back! I ordered the brown sugar mocha with soymilk. The boba was a great sweetness but could have been a bit softer in some parts. Very sweet drink, which I liked. Beautiful presentation. So tasty and creamy. Fast service and a good sized menu. Thank you for having soymilk at no upcharge! This place should be busier, so please visit and show them some love! Last thing: I simply cannot get over how cute the cup is (16 oz.)!
For my first time trying boba I loved it they are so nice and amazing drinks 5/5
A.M.A.Z.I.N.G...that is all

This is a great place for boba tea, and I don't see enough people in it's store. My personal favorite is jasmine green milk tea, 100% sweet (most places make it too sweet but this is less sweet than most of those other places, but 75% is also good) and no ice. The boba itself is soft and sweet, more so than the average boba place. Both of these factors make for an overall great experience and my favorite boba tea of all.
Milk tea warms the tummy
If you like boba, this is the spot.
Best milk tea in Charlotte. No doubt. Highly recommend Darjeeling milk tea and the strawberry matcha latte.

Some of the best quality boba tea we have had in Charlotte! Super fast, friendly ,and helpful! Also a really unique menu to choose from, we had the pineapple yakult with crystal boba and  the thai tea slush with traditional boba, we can't way to come try more soon!
I had the Hongkong milk tea with milk foam topping, 50% less sweet and light ice. It's perfect for those who don't like it too sweet like me. Nice store and great location!
Really good bubble tea and affordable! The mango tea is especially good. You get huge portions as well, so you get a good value. Environment inside is very nice too
Very nice ladies and making delicious drinks 😍
Awesome people and they made my Thai tea like it was meant for me!
Had a great time and the boba was good :)
I like the taro flavor bubble tea

This is my new spot! I've tried most the Bubble tea cafes in Charlotte and this passes almost all of them. The best Thai Tea and strawberry matcha I've ever had. The boba tastes so good and my experience was top tier. This is a local business and can't wait to continue to support them. If I could give 6 stars I would! <3

We order Milk Cha Cha almost every week at work for a group of 4-7 and it has never let us down! The selections are amazing and the tea is always amazing! This is the best bubble tea in Charlotte. If you are lucky enough to stop inside their shop, it is super cute and the staff is so helpful and friendly. I cannot recommend Milk Cha Cha enough!!! If you love Bubble Tea this is the place to go.
The people there are so nice! The drinks are really good too! They been kind enough to host 3 of kpop cup sleeves I’ve been to. Highly  Recommend this place if you love boba!
Drink is very good
Love the menu choices and the energy of the ones making these delicious drinks! Nice addition to the area
Amazing boba, very cute store and friendly  staff
I am so happy I finally tried Milk Cha Cha! I finally found the best brown sugar boba! This place was awesome!!!

Charlotte really has a ton of options for milk tea and I'm always up to trying new places! This is the newest place I've been to and It wasn't a disappointment at all!

The staff was patient waiting on us to decide what we wanted to get and helpful with a few customizations.

The decorations inside was fun and clean and very modern looking. It's literally a great place to take a photo of your drink and then sit and enjoy it.

After ordering it didn't take long for the drinks to arrive and for us to be on our way. A great place to stop if you're in this area and craving milk tea!
Taste so good! I really like that strawberry one with milk foam!!! Amazing! That one let me endless aftertaste! 👍🥤
First time trying Milk Cha-Cha so I went with the regular Hong Kong Milk Tea...so good!...smooth and creamy...can’t wait to go back and try their other flavors!
Delicious
Staff was super friendly even told us we could bring our dog in to visit! First time here and will definitely be stopping by again! Both drinks were amazing!
One of the best Boba’s I’ve ever had! The atmosphere, employees, and tea all deserve 5 stars! Will be coming back to this place a lot!!

The staff was really nice and they helped me customize my drink since it was my first time. The drink was gorgeous, the decor is so cute and I love their cups.
I got the brown sugar milk swirl with soy milk and Oreo boba. It was beyond good honestly. It caught me off guard how good it tasted (not saying that I didn’t expect it to be but wow). I can’t wait to try more flavors.
It's ok. A lot of money for a glass of milk.
Some of the BEST boba I’ve ever had!! Love their teas, and the boba itself is always super fresh!! 10/10 would highly recommend!
Loved the place! Fresh strawberry tea had real strawberries in it, the most delicious boba place in Charlotte for sure!

Loved this place! The drinks were very delicious, the staff was very nice and helpful, service was surprisingly quick, the store itself was cutely decorated and homey in a minimalistic-kawaii sort of way, and the cups are cute and surprisingly durable. I went a couple weeks ago and have been able to reuse the cups (handwashed only) about 4-5 times already. There are lots of drinks options to choose from too which is great and the price point isn't too bad especially for the sizing. I do wish it didn't cost more to add tapioca pearls as a topping though 🥲 other than that I would definitely recommend this place and look forward to going back soon!
Everything was excellent. You've earned 3 new regular customers!
WOW! Where do I even start! Amazing drinks, amazing people, amazing atmosphere, and an amazing location! If you haven't already, check them out! You will definitely be back.
Wow. Soooooo gooooood
My favorite boba spot in Charlotte! Great variety of flavors and teas, lovely staff, I’m always happy to come by here! ❤️🧋😋
I got the #1 Darjeeling Milk Tea with bubbles and it was one of my favorite bubble tea drinks I've ever had! Plus the location is beautiful with the lights at night!
Their brown sugar swirl Boba tea is just awesome 👌
Darjeeling bubble tea was amazing. I highly recommend everyone to get that and try it. its delicious. Great place. friendly staff. Great drinks.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi savanna apologies for your bad experience. Very similar to Starbucks macchiatos, a lot of our drinks require mixing before drinking as we purposely layered most of our drinks so its instagram friendly for our customers. reviews_data.review_text: Inside of the place is cute, but my drink wasn't even mixed. Just tasted like milk with a load of flavoring in the bottom of the cup

I'm a food influencer for Charlotte (@goldengrillscooking) and I'm so happy that I found this place! The atmosphere is engaging, beautiful, and cheerful! The staff was excellent and knowledgeable. Looking through their extensive menu, I decided to order a Taro Milk Tea with Boba and Mango Jelly. It was the exact sweetness I love. I can't wait to return and try other things! I highly recommend if you're looking for a new and hip Boba tea place to expand your palette
!
Love the cute cozy interior. Staff are nice and the drink selection has a great variety.

There's couple Boba shops here in Charlotte, it's hard to say which is the best. Since their all good in their own ways. That said Milk Cha-cha exceeds in excellent quality ingredients and unique flavours. Definetely worth the stop. If your in area this is an excellent locally owned Boba shop you should 100% try.

Milk Cha-Cha is my favorite place to get boba in Charlotte! I’ve never been disappointed in any teas that I’ve got from there. The boba is always fresh, you can select the percentage of sweetness, which I really appreciate, and their cups are just so cute! I’ve got everyone in the office hooked on Milk Cha-Cha and we order it about once a week. Sometimes twice because it’s THAT good. I’ve never been into the store itself, but I imagine it’s probably really cute. The consistency of the teas they make there, is spot on. Every time we order drinks, they’re made exactly how they were the previous time. We order everything from the milk teas, to fruit teas, popping boba, star jellies and regular boba. Everything is fresh and tasty. Sometimes when boba sits for a while, the outside is gooey and inside is slightly hard. The boba is ALWAYS consistent here and cooked correctly. Thanks Milk Cha-Cha! We love you!
I got the Brown Sugar Milk Swirl and it was delicious! I highly recommend this cute place.
Find myself coming here whenever I can.

Absolutely amazing beverages!! High quality ingredients instead of the powder so many other shops use. By far the best in Charlotte. Stop by, grab a drink, check out the shop and snap a photo by the Instagram wall. Recommend the Brown Sugar Milk Swirl!
I had the strawberry mango tea it was awesome!
Awesome tea

The boba here is delicious, I love coming here with my friends and hanging out. Their BTS events are so cool and I love their special drinks that come with it. Their drinks are so good and I like how they add new drinks. One of my favorite boba spots!

Best bubble tea in Charlotte!! Personally favorites are Hong Kong milk tea and strawberry matcha latte. But really you should try everything there. Highly recommended if you want to get some authentic bubble tea!!
Very cute store and the drinks were solid. I enjoyed my strawberry matcha latte.
Ingredients are super fresh and drinks are tasty! I got the Brown Sugar Milk Tea and was one of the best experiences I had in town.
The drinks are on point can't wait to go back
I really liked their drinks. Super fresh and tasty!

Better ingredients better Boba tea, milk cha-cha haha
Got her strawberry tea. Love it!
Delicious!
We ordered 4 items but the employee placed our order as 5 items...then all the hot drinks tasted like sweetened milk... so disappointed
We are heading back again.

Forgive the messy kitchen but THIS is how much we love Milk Cha-Cha!  Some of the best milk tea in Charlotte and perhaps across the country? The product is ALWAYS fresh and consistent no matter the time of the day!
Came here for the BTSxCLT Event and I loved it
Best bubble tea I've ever had. The staff were energetic and helpful.
Milk Cha-Cha is Ah-Mazing!  Taste just like real Boba from Taiwan-Yummy!!  We had Brown Sugar Milk Tea and the Jasmine Tea + Boba.
My daughters love this place.me too though:)  😃
BEST boba in Charlotte!!!!! Too bad i live near university and its a bit far from but i guess it also saves me some $$$$$ cus id be coming here everyday!
great tea great service! Everyone was really nice in helping me decide what to get, since their menu is a bit different but unique than more boba shops. Will definitely be back
Awesome customer service and it tastes great
Really good drinks. The decor and service is nice as well. I like the real fruit options!

tried their hong kong milk tea for the first time today, which they told me was the classic, it was greeeeeat!!!!! Im normally not a tea drinker but my friend dragged me in today and its the best ever!!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Misti! Thanks for trying! We do have blended tea. As we are a boba tea shop there will definitely be overlap on items. The cups we use are industry standards that a lot of other boba places carry as well.  I will definitely relay the stare feedback to my employees. Thanks again for trying. Have a great weekend!
reviews_data.review_text: Why is it that places only do iced or hot teas in South Charlotte? Everywhere else offers blended teas. This places seems identical to the Around The World café (even the same cups), but all of the employees stare at you when ordering. I tried my friends thai tea and it was okay, I just personally won’t be going back. If blended teas with boba is what you’re looking for, I’m afraid you’re going to have to find somewhere else.
Trying this for the first time and it’s bomb ! Love it
Nice tea but apparently the owner doesn't give their employees the tips they get. Scummy if true.
One of my favorite places.

reviews_data.review_text: Delicious drinks and friendly service. Will definitely come back!
The strawberry and mango tornados are so yummy and the service here is great!

Went there two times, first time i had some interesting boba alternative, passion fruit, not my favorite but the tea was great. That time they ran out boba, however the guy working there was super friendly and accommodating, he let us try couple different boba jelly things and we picked one. The other time we went they had regular tapioca boba and the tea was great. Would come back. It’s also a cute place, and picture ready for those interested.

P.S. My ratings are based on whether I believe I could make a better or healthier version at home. If food/drinks/service impress me, I’ll be happy to come back. If not the stars reflect that.

🚩 they offer incentives for leaving a 5 star review

I spent a little over $20 for three drinks

Ube slush w/ boba - Didn’t taste at all like Ube, crunchy ice b/c not blended enough, undercooked boba

Strawberry matcha - The matcha was dark green in color and so so sooo bitter and gritty. I enjoyed the few sips of strawberry from the bottom until the matcha fell to the bottom. Had to toss the whole drink

Hong Kong milk tea w/ grass jelly - below mid, tastes like old tea leaves were used. I could swear it’s Lipton. Milk tea powder would’ve tasted better. Grass Jelly was so strange, very very sweet and tasted like honey.

Just reminds me how spoiled I am in Dallas with the likes of Tiger Sugar, TP Tea, 7 Leaves, and Moge Tee

Typically love this boba place but today was one of the worst experience to date. We walked in and didn’t even get greeted the young lady at the cash register stared at us with out saying a word for about 3 mins before WE had to be the ones to greet her. The drinks themselves were very subpar and even though we asked for extra boba got less than we usually get. Drinks had no flavor and tasted like watery milk. All of the benches were broken and the wood pinches your legs when you sit in it.This place used to be great until they got new employees. Would no longer recommend.

One of my favorite after-dinner dessert stops 🖤 I do wish they still had the small sizes for their fruit drinks; I go a little less often now because of how expensive the larger sizes are. But the staff are really friendly and it’s always delicious.

Milk Cha Cha has quickly become one of my favorite bubble tea spots! The milk tea is rich and creamy without being overly sweet, and the tea flavor still shines through beautifully. The tapioca pearls are consistently chewy and fresh—never hard or soggy.

They also offer great variety with fun flavors and toppings, so there’s something for everyone. The drinks are presented nicely, and the atmosphere is bright and welcoming—perfect for hanging out with friends or grabbing a quick treat.

If you’re a bubble tea lover, Milk Cha Cha is definitely worth trying. It’s refreshing, delicious, and always leaves me wanting to come back for another cup!

Was passing through when my children and their friend wanted boba. This was our first time as we’re from out of state. Ordered 3 drinks and I should’ve ordered myself one because it was delicious! Would recommend. They were excited about the popping boba with the fresh fruit chunks it was refreshing and honestly not bad of a price. Drinks were $6.75 each!
This is one of our favorite boba of all time. We keep going back to it no matter how many other places we go to.
Great boba awesome staff

I was pleasantly surprised to find proper milk tea in Charlotte. And this place doesn't disappoint. The selection of options is vast and the service is friendly and fast.

I did find the boba to be not as soft (almost like they were boiled a while ago and not as fresh as I wanted) and the drink even at 50% sugar was quite sweet. I think next time I will go for 25%. This is especially necessary if you add boba, since Boba is often boiled in honey so that sugar level cannot be adjusted.

Anyways, I'm overall happy, was a bit disappointed about the tapioca pearls.

We drove 20 minutes with the whole family specifically to this location because it’s supposed to stay open later on Fridays and Saturdays. According to the posted hours, you’re open until 10 PM. We arrived at 9:50 PM, only to find the store already completely closed—lights off, doors shut, no one inside.

Why advertise extended hours if you’re not actually going to honor them? It’s incredibly disappointing, especially when families make an effort to come out late expecting service. Please update your hours or make sure your staff follows the posted schedule.

Service was lackluster. Employees were not enthused. Told them it was my first time, gave no recommendations and zero energy, until I came back for a refund. The matcha was brown and the drink was literally just thrown together vs actually prepared in the way I’ve seen boba prepared at other boba places and it was lacking flavor very watery. I got the strawberry matcha with strawberry poppers. Do not recommend.

This place has a good drinks I love some and some of it I don’t. The only complaint I have is the dirty the bathroom I understand it’s only one bathroom for everyone  🤦🏼‍♂️🤦🏻‍♀️👶 employee etc and the seating area is dirty as well 😕 they have to clean the place. I don’t want to imagine the inside. 😳
Service was very quick it took roughly 30-45 seconds to get the drink after ordering, it was moderately expensive for a drink at about $5-$7 a drink but it’s definitely worth it, would come again.

The employees are very friendly but overall this boba place SUCKS!!!

I’ve went twice , the first time I had a milk swirl drink… it was straight up milk with a hint of boba …. Second time I had the strawberry matcha & IT TASTED TERRIBLE , the match wasn’t good , and the drink was watered down , the strawberry purée was okay but the boba wasn’t enough to even save the drink .

Always a have a great experience here, I love the fruity mango tea with lychee popping boba but today I tried the chocolate tea with boba and Oreo pieces. They even have games to set up and play with friends in store.
Good boba!
One of the best spots in south Charlotte for boba tea. Good ube/taro options. Nice atmosphere with board and card games available to play. Was very-well made.  Friendly service.
Amazing tea, fast service, super cute store! 10/10 (I particularly love the Thai tea)

Milk cha-cha are you a joke?? Got a kiwi fruit tea and it’s the worst kiwi I’ve ever had.

Do not recommend this place. The ingredients are just so cheap
没话说 太难喝了 跟放了一晚上一样 我点了个kiwi的果茶
Ube Latte bubble tea was quite good!
Delicious tea / boba
Smells so good in here😍 My boyfriend ordered the brown suger milk swirl and the taro slushie with Boba in both. They were so yummy and we got them so fast.

amazing def recommend

BEST BOBA AROUND!

They are never consistent with the Strawberry Matcha milk tea. There is this specific guy that makes it like how the advertised picture looks like. But if you don’t catch the days he works, other workers make it horrible and they are very greedy with the strawberry in it. My last order, they just literally filled the cup with milk more than anything that all you taste was just milk and sugar. If you kno how that taste like, then you know what I’m talking about. Which makes it upsetting because if I wanted milk and sugar l, I wouldn’t come to a boba shop for that. We asked the worker that it’s not consistent, she wasn’t accommodating or sorry. She says they make it same way as always. Which I know it’s a lie because I have pictures of the one I used to get from that specific guy. And the one they made us I. reviews_data.review_text: 1 star for racial profiling. Went here two days ago with a friend. On the way out we stopped by the snack shelf. The guy behind the counter, who had not spoken to us once the whole time we were sitting there, became very aggressive, asking us what we wanted without even giving us a chance to look. I've worked in restaurants and retail and know he was employing anti-theft tactics, and I was sitting there long enough to see no one else got interrogated. Next time just put a "No Blacks" sign on the window. We'll get the message and save our money.

reviews_data.review_text: One of my favorite milk tea shop. :)
I rly like the boba
Love the vibes here! Great place to stop by and enjoy some beverages at a shopping trip at Rea Farm. Drinks are great!

first time coming here today at the grand opening at rea farms, and it was a very nice environment :), very friendly staff, cute and minimalistic place, very good boba tea
10/10 recommend 🤍

A bubble tea lover's paradise. I love love love bubble tea spots that have matcha on the menu, and believe me, not many do! I recently came here for bubble tea, although, it was a treat by one of my friends, so I decided to try something I've never had before. I decided on a strawberry match tea with boba. Personally, I don't like sweet things mixed with my milk teas, so this wasn't something I enjoyed. However, I have gotten my usual order from this location before (Match Milk Tea w/Boba), so I know they do a good job.

I would recommend this spot!

A small shop with a fantastic atmosphere and drinks. I had the brown sugar tea and that was a chef's kiss. Angels were singing in the background when I had it. I was recommended the mango tea the next time I come back, or any fruit teas in general, because it really does taste like the fruit.

I love Milk Cha-Cha bubble teas. I tried several and my favorite is 0%-25% sweet bobba strawberry mango Yakurt because it’s caffeine free, probiotic and something unique to this business and not found in other bubble tea places.

The complaint I have is the sweetness of the drinks. And I guess the service as well.
Why is the default sweetness straight up diabetes? Why is it 100% and not 50%?

Can we normalize asking people what sweetness they want , and if not please don’t feed them 100% sweet , it’s disgusting and unhealthy. Tastes like I gulped a jar of honey. To the trash it went. And they are not cheap $9 per one large drink with bobas.
I have yet to find another boba shop that is better than this place. The tea is brewed nicely and boba is soft, warm, and syrupy. If I ever come back to Charlotte, it's to visit this place.
Wonderful service and drinks!

The tea was delicious and the price was reasonable. They were also quick. Very clean store and really pretty. I gave four stars because the two employees weren't friendly at all. I understand sometimes there's day we don't feel like talking at all, but not even a smile... The tea is very good, I will go back for the tea, but only in sunny 🌞 days...

reviews_data.review_text: Love the drinks but the employees need to take a class on customer service because it is lacking. As an Asian dude who is obsessed with boba.. this place is still my favorite, I’ve traveled all over the US and I miss this place a lot! The quality and variety of their boba is unmatched.

Highly would recommend if you’re ever in the area. Parking is easy too.

This is the second time I've been here and definitely will be the last. Everytime I go, the Boba is boiling hot to the point it turns what should be an ice cold drink lukewarm. That, and my Kiwi Tea was overridden with hard seeds and granulated textures it became undrinkable. Two sips and I threw it in the trash and left.

Staff were more interested in talking to each other than welcoming us & telling us about the products.
My first & last time going there
really nice milk tea！！！
Great boba and people. I come here all the time for boba.
非常正宗的奶茶 两天报道一次，在我心里clt排名第一的奶茶店
One of my new favorite milk tea spots in Charlotte, the Rose Oolong with aloe was incredible. I like it at 25% sweet so you can really taste the flavor. I highly recommend it!

This establishment consistently delivers high-quality and flavorful tea, which has kept us coming back for more on multiple occasions. The standout option for me is the mango tea with lychee jelly, which I highly recommend from their menu. Overall, this spot ranks among the best in Charlotte for bubble tea.

Stopped by Milk Cha-Cha after church today.

It's a nice spot for a refreshing drink. I tried the Strawberry Cha Tea. It's smooth and you could taste the freshness of the strawberries.

The service was fast and Carlton was incredibly friendly and agreed to the photo. The atmosphere is relaxed and chic. I would definitely return.

reviews_data.review_text: Staff was on their phones,  very rude...! I'm not visit that place again

Love the banana 🍌 swirl here! Delicious!💗
Super friendly staff for this boba newbie. Was able to find something without added sugar. Everything was fun and tasty 🤩🧋
The help was amazing because my kids had a million questions about the Boba Tea (never heard of it until then). My family loved the tea and raved the whole time they were drinking it!!!!

Points: Great drinks, okay service, okay atmosphere.
I'm staying at a nearby hotel and saw this place passing by. I knew I had to stop and get something; I got the Pineapple Bubbly Cha-Cha with strawberry popping boba add-in. This was absolutely delicious and I'll probably stop again before leaving! The service was alright. I've seen other reviews mentioning the lack of "smiles", but for me it wasn't too different than service I've received from other boba shops or Asian markets. She was polite and quick with the order, but not very helpful when I mentioned I had never been there. Simply pointed at the pictures and the menu. I'm comfortable without human interaction, though, and I had peeked at the menu before coming. The only other reason this didn't make 5 stars is the atmosphere. A lot of people referred to it as clean, and maybe it was prior, but there was dust caked on a bunch of the decorations, especially the big fake plant right at the front door. Otherwise, though the tables were clean and I think it's cute they provide board games - though I definitely wouldn't find myself using this place as a hang out at all. I do like the collection of merch available and I almost purchased a stuffed dinosaur, but noticed the arm was ripped and the stuffing exposed, but it was still in the package ready to sell 🤔

Summary: great place for grabbing a drink on the go! Dust your fake plants! Merch is cute but look it over well before buying

Took the family to Milk Cha-Cha and we absolutely loved it! From the moment we entered the establishment the atmosphere was filled with great vibes. Perhaps it was the chill music or the welcoming staff. The tea was amazing! Peach would have to be my personal favorite. Truly up for debate as every tea we ordered all tasted really great. Hong Kong was also a strong pleaser at our table. Speaking of table, they have board games at each table. Definitely a great way to people to stay awhile, enjoy some tasty refreshments, and unwind from the crazy world outside. Rest assured, we will be regular at Milk Cha-Cha!
One of the best boba tea.
Love it

Very rude and unfriendly/ unprofessional staff, I came to meet up here with a friend for the first time after hearing somewhat good things.
But even my friend was disgusted by the employees behavior, it was slow for a Saturday and a female employee rudely greeted me when I needed to order.
While waiting the boys were being obnoxious and loud, making weird inappropriate jokes that disturbed me and other customers you can tell.

I work in customer service and this was just awful, the drink was poorly made too.
Won’t be coming back again unless you get better staff who actually want to do their jobs

Service was wonderful and the tea was amazing!!! We got the ube slush and the cantaloupe slush. It was a hot day so it hit the spot!!! It was so creamy and delicious! The flavor was strong and even though I drink slowly it tasted good to the last drop! The boba also was on point and tasted a bit warm and nice and soft and chewy. The only thing I would change about this place is the seating. It isn’t inviting or unique. This place is so good the seating should match and be unique and fun and make me want to enjoy my boba there! Will definitely be back for more!!!

Love this place , the owners are amazing , the boba is fresh , amazing quality! I have gone to many boba places in my life , I consider my self a picky food person, this place hands down the best boba place you will find!! Highly recommend their Taro, Hong Kong tea and dragonfruit!  You will get addicted to this place and will want to go every day!!!

The first we visited this place was probably in December 2021, we had great experience. Today, I went back during the day around 12, had fantastic experience. The ube drink was very very good. However, we revisit it again at night before they close. The service was meh, drink was disappointed. I ordered a hot drink because it was cold outside, the drink was like a little warm, maybe it was almost cold. We asked for some milk, but the cashier charged us for like a buba tea drink. We kind feel that is alittle over charged. Overall, we do like the place, but just feel it is better to visit during the day.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Jacqui, apologies for the confusion. If you are looking for pure teas, we do serve organic jasmine yin hao and our rose ooloong. Our rose oolong is made from real rose pedals steeped together with imported organic iron goddess oolong tea without any artificial flavoring. Although our pure tea section is small, one of our most favorite products is the fresh strawberry tea where it is organic jasmine tea blended with fresh strawberries. Our strawberry milk swirl has strawberry puree that is handmade puree from freshly cut strawberries and sugar. Thanks so much for your feedback and support!
reviews_data.review_text: Don't have any pure teas - all the teas they have are either milk teas or flavored with something like strawberry or rose... A real bubble tea place should have real teas available, i.e. plain black tea, green tea, oolong tea, mountain tea, etc. without the artificial bs!

I am a great lover of bubble tea 🧋 but one of my problems is that I am a little lactose intolerant 😖😞 I love to see that of so many locations I have visited, this is the first one I find with vegetable milk option 💚 I ordered 100% ice and sugar and it is still balanced and delicious and the decoration of the bathroom door and the entrance are great and funny, I must definitely try other flavors again and maybe a bigger size 🤭 my boyfriend and I will definitely come back 🫶

reviews_data.review_text: My favorite place to get boba in Charlotte! They have so many authentic drinks and lots of non-dairy/vegan options. My favorite is the Mango Fruit Tea.

Their boba and fruit teas are okay. It’s good, but not my favorite. It’s definitely on the pricier end compared to other boba shops. The brown sugar can be a bit too sweet despite the less sweet and extra ice, but that’s just me because some people like extra sweet things. Milk tea is a bit watery. The Yakult line is pretty good.

Went there today, it was my sisters first time there. She tried the Thai tea but did not like it. When i asked for them to make a different one for her they told me to pay for a new one.
Very rude service. I have been coming here for 1 year and never had such bad service !
😍 loved the boba

If milk tea is your thing, then this is the place for your.

Stopped by on a sunday and we got our drinks within a 2-3minutes. They're really fast. Drinks were good. Service was good, they did a good job explaining the drinks and level of sweetness of each offering.

It's also in a nice location that is located in a contemporary and modern space.
service/friendliness isn’t amazing, but their boba is good. the employees seem less bored and lifeless these days which is why I increased the stars

I've been here several times before for events, but I was finally able to make it back on my own so I can actually review it now.

On our most recent visit, my husband and I shared a Ube Slush and Mango Milk Swirl. We loved both of them. My personal favorite was the Mango Milk Swirl.

Their boba is a bit too mushy for my preference, so I opt for their jellies as toppings instead. Their drinks always taste fresh. It's definitely worth a stop if you haven't been!
Always the best! Try the Oolong rose tea 20% sweet with extra boba, it’s so good.
It was a pleasant experience, and the drinks were 🔥  I recommend everyone to check it out. It had a friendly vibe.
I adore this place!!! The drinks are always so delicious and the staff is always super friendly. Would recommend!

Bubble is sweet!

Delicious Boba Tea!!! I had the Brown Sugar Milk Swirl Boba Tea, husband enjoyed the Strawberry Tea with pop-able Boba, kids had Mango Tea with pop-able Boba and an Ube Slush. Everything was fantastic!!! We’ll definitely be stopping by again when in the area.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks so much for your amazing review!
reviews_data.review_text: the most toe curling, fist clenching, eye watering, scream inducing boba i’ve ever had in my entire life.

guys. i love this place. i live 45~ mins away and i regularly make the trip over here because the boba is just so good. the okinawa latte and matcha are both amazing! and they have milk subs too!!!!!  i’ve been to a lot of boba places but this one will always be my favorite!!! :3
New Bubble Tea place. Delicious. Definitely worth a try. Really nice decor , cool place to hang for a little while
Delicious fruit and bubble teas, tons of choices. Wish they open a location around Spartanburg, SC.

Not my first rodeo at Milk Cha Cha! They did not disappoint. This shop is nestled in a plaza that continues to grow. There is not much seating, but the inside is so cute. Great for quick meets or just picking up. Although there isn't much seating, it does not feel cramped and the aesthetic of the inside has a fresh open feel to it. Not to mention, there are lots of spots for cute photos.

Now on to the drinks! I ordered the mango matcha latte with boba pearls, and my friend got the brown sugar boba. This was my first time having a matcha and mango combo, and to my surprise it was delicious! The matcha was especially strong, which I love. For some, matcha is definitely an acquired taste, so maybe this would not be the right drink for you. The good news is that they have so many other drinks to choose from! A previous drink I've had that was super tasty was the Strawberry yalkult drink-- sweet and tangy in flavor and cold for a nice refresh for the Summer.
Simply the best! Thanks again!!!

Tried this place twice and had a great experience each time. The store was pretty clean with nice decor. I got the brown Sugar Swirl with Boba and Oreo for my first visit and without oreo for my second and both were good. The only thing is that they kinda skimped on the boba, so be sure to ask for extra if you are a huge boba fan. Would definitely come back to this place and try more flavors when in the Southpark area.
THINGS ARE ON THE TABLE
Amazing place and amazing teas. I travel 30 mins every weekend to have the amazing Taro milk tea.
Always order their green milk tea with pudding, great taste and friendly staff, a nice place.
Great tea and prompt service! The young man at the register was very helpful.
loved the boba and the atmosphere!
Great drinks, friendly staff, great variety and reasonable prices. Everything I have tried has tasted amazing and I like that they ask how much ice and sweetness I want in the drink!

Never disappoints! One of the few places serving matcha that doesn't taste powdery in the drinks.
Really good bubble tea!

We walked in and nobody greeted us. They all just stared... which made us feel kind of uncomfortable. Anyway, I ordered the Thai slush and it wasn't like the normal consistency of a regular slush milk tea boba from other stores. cashier was rude and had an attitude.

today. A friend had recommended to me.
After reading the reviews I drove thirty minutes to give it a try. It far exceeded my expectations! The staff was wonderful and patient with me as I ask for recommendations. I selected the Fresh Mango yogurt drink with boba and milk foam. I was so delicious. Perfect sweetness and ice. The milk foam really made it. I was so sad to finish it. I will definitely be going back for another and to try other flavors
$6.50 (incl tax) for 22 oz Uber Slush with lychee jelly

I love their jasmine green milk tea! They have the most fragrance jasmine aroma compare to all the tea places I’ve tried. I have drank tea from the east coast to the west coast, none can match Milk Cha Cha flavor so far!!
