reviews_data.review_text: This was my first time here and I wanted to try the Strawberry Tea. I ordered it through DoorDash as a pick up and I was about 5-10 minutes away. When I got there to pick up, my drink was extremely loose and milky with no slush and the Asian guy with glasses and black hoodie says “yeah sorry, * laughs*, it should be okay”. I asked him if there was anyway he could remake it? He answered “I’m not sure if I can do that” with an attitude. I did not understand the push back on remaking the drink if something is wrong with it, and you as the associate knew that something was wrong with the drink, why not remake it? Thankfully, he remade the drink but made it with an attitude and slammed it on the counter. I did not appreciate the attitude. I usually go to ShareTea and will continue to go there for now on.
Great place for Bubble teas. Son ordered their chocolate tea which was absolutely yummy. And I  ordered their amazing Pineapple Green Tea. Will be going back. Wonderful staff and quick service.
Good place at a great location, wide variety and customizable with any flavor from the menu.
Best boba in Charlotte!

Love coming here when I’m in town! Tried the rose oolong milk tea this time and loved it. Not too sweet but had a hint of rose. I love their boba here so fresh and chewy! That’s why I always get extra boba in my milk teas. The staff here is always so sweet and make the drinks real quick. I will definitely be back to try some more different teas.

Parking is easy there are some spots that you have to parallel in and others where you can just park. Getting here is super easy it’s super close to South Park mall. So if you are going to the mall to shop make sure to get your quick fix of milk teas!
Expansive and creative menu. Caters to all allergies and dietary preferences. Branding is super cute and makes the experience even better. Come here for your bespoke drink needs.
Super friendly and tastes amazing
The Strawberry Milk Swirl was delicious! Really appreciated the tasty fresh strawberry pieces mixed in.

Great vibes, fantastic staff and owners, hip decor and most importantly delicious drinks! This is next level stuff that tastes distinctly better than your average boba chain place. I was never crazy for boba in the past because all I knew was shops like Kung Fu Tea. But Milk Cha Cha is a place I truly enjoyed and I can't recommend it enough. Do yourself a favor and try it out. You won't regret it!

my strawberry milk swirl tasted straight up like white milk and i asked for extra boba but even so it tastes nothing like any strawberries .i looked back at the menu and it says fresh strawberry purée like where is it .
Tasty bubble tea
Love boba but this would have to be the best place yet, great customer service!

This is the best place in Charlotte to get bubble tea! Everything is made with fresh fruit instead of flavored syrups and they offer dairy free options! Absolutely love this place!

reviews_data.review_text: It brings me back memories! Lol our family used to have a boba store in NYC so this is the closest as good as it gets! Go in and enjoy the fun of it! Favorite brown sugar milk tea 🧋 cheers !
The best boba tea, loved everything I’ve tried so far! Staff is always super friendly and helpful.
my number one favorite boba shop in charlotte! i love their hong kong milk tea with boba, sub with soy milk. it’s my all time favorite! <3
I got the Darjeeling tea, %75 sweet, with Boba and it was delicious!
Definitely one of my favorite places in Charlotte. You can not go wrong with any of the drink options.
Super friendly staff, they explained all the drinks and made great recommendations! We got the brown sugar milk swirl and the banana milk swirl with mango boba amd they were delicious!

Very sad about this experience! Lots of business are closed for the holidays, and that's no problem! We looked online and saw that they were open on google until 9:30 yesterday (Sunday 1/2). We arrive and see a closed sign on the door. There was also another sign that they are closed 1/3 - 1/6. There was another group that walked up and read the sign at the same time as us. Just wished google and yelp was updated so we didn't make the 20 minute drive to come here.
Solid boba! Best in the uptown/South Park area for sure :)
No kidding, you will get the best drink in town.
Love the boba here! Highly recommend the brown sugar milk tea with milk cap
Hands down the best boba in Charlotte! Great service, fresh and super tasty. Love this spot so much!
Very good
Adorable place, feels very cozy and welcoming!!! Bubble tea was very delicious :3

Milk Cha Cha is one of the best boba places in Charlotte. My favorite drink to get there is the strawberry matcha latte. The matcha wasn't too bitter and strawberry not to sweet. The right combination for a great drink. My friends got the Thai tea and the Fresh Mango Yakult which were pretty good. I'm not the biggest fan of boba, but my friends said the boba was great. All around great place to get boba and chill with friends.
My first boba tea experience! The associates helped me choose my tea. (they have soy for non dairy ppl, too!) My iced matcha boba tea was delicious! I can’t wait to go back.

Always so welcoming and such a great place to vibe or hang out! The boba is SO DELICIOUS! It’s my favorite boba place in charlotte! Most places can’t perfect classic teas but they can! The drinks and teas that they have on their menu are just amazing!

Based on the reviews I was hoping for so much, but this was just mediocre. My strawberry tea was burnt (over steeped) which left this bitter dry after taste. The aloe jelly tasted funny. I can't put my finger on what was wrong. Some of the aloe was way too soft, others hard & some had a bit of a sour taste.. The jasmine milk tea was also just okay. We were happy that we got a milk tea for the jasmine, otherwise I can't imagine drinking such a strong floral tea. But, the boba it self was good. We tried the brown sugar boba and that one was the best. Overall, just meh
Kids love it

Ambiance is lovely! They are located in the nicest area and you can park for 1 hour on the street or nearby parking garage for free. The staff was friendly and helpful. The music they played was nice and upbeat. There was seating and gorgeous decor. All gender restroom available. I'll definitely be back! I ordered the brown sugar mocha with soymilk. The boba was a great sweetness but could have been a bit softer in some parts. Very sweet drink, which I liked. Beautiful presentation. So tasty and creamy. Fast service and a good sized menu. Taste so good! I really like that strawberry one with milk foam!!! Amazing! That one let me endless aftertaste! 👍🥤

Loved this place! The drinks were very delicious, the staff was very nice and helpful, service was surprisingly quick, the store itself was cutely decorated and homey in a minimalistic-kawaii sort of way, and the cups are cute and surprisingly durable. I went a couple weeks ago and have been able to reuse the cups (handwashed only) about 4-5 times already. There are lots of drinks options to choose from too which is great and the price point isn't too bad especially for the sizing. I do wish it didn't cost more to add tapioca pearls as a topping though 🥲 other than that I would definitely recommend this place and look forward to going back soon!
Everything was excellent. You've earned 3 new regular customers!

I'm a food influencer for Charlotte (@goldengrillscooking) and I'm so happy that I found this place! The atmosphere is engaging, beautiful, and cheerful! The staff was excellent and knowledgeable. Looking through their extensive menu, I decided to order a Taro Milk Tea with Boba and Mango Jelly. It was the exact sweetness I love. I can't wait to return and try other things! I highly recommend if you're looking for a new and hip Boba tea place to expand your palette
!
Love the cute cozy interior. Staff are nice and the drink selection has a great variety.

There's couple Boba shops here in Charlotte, it's hard to say which is the best. Since their all good in their own ways. That said Milk Cha-cha exceeds in excellent quality ingredients and unique flavours. Definetely worth the stop. If your in area this is an excellent locally owned Boba shop you should 100% try.

Milk Cha-Cha is my favorite place to get boba in Charlotte! I’ve never been disappointed in any teas that I’ve got from there. The boba is always fresh, you can select the percentage of sweetness, which I really appreciate, and their cups are just so cute! I’ve got everyone in the office hooked on Milk Cha-Cha and we order it about once a week. Sometimes twice because it’s THAT good. I’ve never been into the store itself, but I imagine it’s probably really cute. The consistency of the teas they make there, is spot on. Every time we order drinks, they’re made exactly how they were the previous time. We order everything from the milk teas, to fruit teas, popping boba, star jellies and regular boba. Everything is fresh and tasty. Sometimes when boba sits for a while, the outside is gooey and inside is slightly hard. The boba is ALWAYS consistent here and cooked correctly. Thanks Milk Cha-Cha! We love you!
I got the Brown Sugar Milk Swirl and it was delicious! I highly recommend this cute place.
Find myself coming here whenever I can.

Absolutely amazing beverages!! High quality ingredients instead of the powder so many other shops use. By far the best in Charlotte. Stop by, grab a drink, check out the shop and snap a photo by the Instagram wall. Recommend the Brown Sugar Milk Swirl!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Misti! Thanks for trying! We do have blended tea. As we are a boba tea shop there will definitely be overlap on items. reviews_data.review_text: Why is it that places only do iced or hot teas in South Charlotte? Everywhere else offers blended teas. This places seems identical to the Around The World café (even the same cups), but all of the employees stare at you when ordering. I tried my friends thai tea and it was okay, I just personally won’t be going back. If blended teas with boba is what you’re looking for, I’m afraid you’re going to have to find somewhere else.
Trying this for the first time and it’s bomb ! Love it

One of my favorite places.
